div.div:
This view borrows the
look of common AWS-style
architecture diagrams:
- official icons lead
the layout
- labels name real repo
and workflow roles
- Aurora neutrals, cyan,
and amber stay in the accents

div.div: Actual runtime is GitHub Pages-style static delivery, not AWS hosting. The docs flow is company-only; each game publishes its own page.
